abilities.name: Demise (Bad Influence)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, models within (r) 4" gain a Brilliance token.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Shred
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: The Light Inside
triggers.text: This model or the target gains a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Thrash
triggers.text: Remove all markers and destructible terrain within (x)1" of this model.

actions.name: Shimmerlungs
actions.effects: The target and models within (x)2" of the target gain a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Brilliance Unfolding
triggers.text: Once per turn. Draw a number of cards equal to the number of models that gained a Brilliance token from this action.

triggers.name: All In
triggers.text: This model may deal up to 2 irreducible damage to itself. When resolving, deal +1 damage to the target per damage suffered when declaring this trigger.

triggers.name: Hole in the World
triggers.text: Place the target within 6" of its current location.
